Name: Spirit of the Fray
Description: Moving like a blur of fur, claws, and muscle, the Garou is able to attack multiple opponents within reach. A wolverine- or badger-spirit grants this Gift.
System: The Gift allows the Garou to attack additional opponents, within reach, up to the character’s Glory, without penalty. Make a single attack roll and apply it to every opponent engaged and covered by the Rage expenditure (see cost). Any additional bonus to the attack applies to all opponents.
RageChecks: One Rage Check per additional opponent
